title: Fabric Create Mod + More
description: Using the Fabric Version of the Create mod with more mods and addons to improve gameplay.
body:
This Mod Pack Uses Create Fabric for Base gameplay with extra mods to improve the experience.


All required dependencies are included these are:

- Fabric API
- Architectury API
- Fabric Language Koltin
- Sodium
- Indium

The Modpack fetures create Spesific aditions:

- Create Fabric
- Create Slice and Dice
- Create Steam’ N’ Rails
- Create High Pressure
- Create Helmet Goggles
- Create Crafts Additions
- Create Enchanment Industry

And other Mods Like:

- Jade
- Jade Addons
- JEI
- Xearos MiniMap

This Pack also **includes [Iris](https://www.irisshaders.dev/)** for compatability with shaders.

All together this pack creates a somewhat basic and very enjoyable Create Mod Experience.
